input: Analyze this 10-K filing: ~/documents/AAPL-10K-2025.pdf. Focus on revenue trends, margin analysis, and risk factors. Generate an executive briefing.
expected_behavior: Phase 1: Extracts text and tables from PDF via opendataloader
Phase 2: Identifies and extracts key financial statements (income statement, balance sheet, cash flow)
Phase 3: Computes ratios (gross margin, net margin, ROE, D/E, current ratio) and YoY trends
Phase 4: Detects anomalies and flags risk factors from MD&A section
Phase 5: Generates executive-briefing.docx via anthropic-docx with visual financial dashboard
Phase 6: Saves all outputs to outputs/financial-report-analyzer/{date}/ with manifest.json
success_criteria: Financial statements extracted correctly; ratios computed; trends identified; executive-briefing.docx generated; visual dashboard with charts

input: Compare Q3 and Q4 2025 earnings for NVDA. PDFs: ~/reports/NVDA-Q3-2025.pdf and ~/reports/NVDA-Q4-2025.pdf. Highlight changes in revenue segments and margins.
expected_behavior: Extracts comparable financial metrics from both quarters
Generates variance analysis highlighting revenue segment changes
Produces comparison table and trend charts
success_criteria: Both reports parsed; variance analysis with segment breakdowns; comparison table present in output

input: 이 사업보고서 분석해줘: ~/documents/삼성전자-사업보고서-2025.pdf. 매출 추이와 영업이익률 중심으로 경영진 브리핑 생성.
expected_behavior: Handles Korean financial terminology (매출액, 영업이익, 당기순이익, etc.)
Generates Korean executive briefing via sentence-polisher
Financial ratios labeled in Korean with English equivalents
success_criteria: Korean report parsed; ratios computed; Korean executive briefing generated with correct terminology

description: Stock price analysis should route to daily-stock-check
input: What's the current stock price of AAPL and should I buy?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT be invoked for stock price queries
Request should route to daily-stock-check or trading-us-stock-analysis
success_criteria: Skill does not activate; routing goes to stock analysis skills

description: Month-end close process should route to kwp-finance-close-management
input: Help me manage the month-end close process. What tasks need to be completed?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT be invoked for close management
success_criteria: Skill does not activate; routing goes to kwp-finance-close-management
